name: Secure Document Viewer
description: Secure document viewing surface with watermark overlay, download guards, redaction display, and audit trail indicators for confidential document workflows.

standard.description: Full viewer with page navigator, zoom controls, watermark overlay, download guard, and audit badge for complete secure viewing

minimal.description: Preview-only mode without download controls or pagination, used for quick reviews and inline embeds with watermark still enforced

redacted.description: Specialized variant highlighting redaction overlays prominently for legal and compliance review workflows where redactions must be auditable

visual_brief: A document page rendered within a scrollable viewport with a diagonal repeating watermark overlay that covers the entire document area. Watermark text reads 'CONFIDENTIAL - {user.email} - {timestamp}' at 45 degrees, repeated in a grid pattern with approximately 12% opacity in text-muted color, rotated and tiled across the page. A thin control bar (48px tall) sits above the document showing: page navigator center (e.g. '3 of 24') with previous/next arrows, zoom controls right (-, percentage, +), download button at far right that shows a lock icon and opens a permission-check modal. Audit badge floats in the bottom-right corner as a small dark pill reading 'VIEW LOGGED' with a small eye icon, semi-transparent with backdrop-blur. Redactions appear as solid black rectangles overlaid on document text with white 'REDACTED' label centered. Page transitions with smooth scroll. Document canvas has subtle shadow suggesting paper.

slots.control-bar: Horizontal toolbar (48px) at top with page navigator, zoom controls, and download guard button. Light background with subtle border-bottom.
slots.document-canvas: Main scrollable document viewport. Renders pages sequentially with subtle paper shadow and gutter between pages. Supports click-to-zoom and pan at higher zoom levels.
slots.watermark-layer: Overlay layer on top of document content rendering diagonal repeating watermark pattern. Non-interactive pointer-events-none. Opacity 12% of text-muted color. Text includes user identity and timestamp.
slots.page-content: Individual rendered page within the canvas. Standard document page with text, images, and layout preserved from source.
slots.redaction-overlay: Black rectangles positioned absolutely over redacted regions with white 'REDACTED' label centered. Must render above document content but below watermark.
slots.audit-badge: Floating pill (bottom-right) showing that this view is being logged. Backdrop-blur semi-transparent. Small eye icon with 'VIEW LOGGED' text.
slots.download-guard: Download button that triggers permission check modal before allowing file download. Shows lock icon when user lacks download permission.

responsive.mobile: Control bar stacks: page navigator on top row, zoom and download on second row. Watermark text reduces font size but maintains density. Single-page scroll mode only.
responsive.tablet: Standard layout with slightly condensed control bar. Touch pinch-to-zoom enabled.
responsive.desktop: Full layout with all controls inline. Keyboard shortcuts for navigation and zoom enabled.

layout_hints.document_priority: The secured document itself is the primary surface. Watermarks, redactions, and audit cues should protect the content without obscuring normal reading more than necessary.
layout_hints.control_role: Navigation, zoom, and guarded download controls belong in one compact strip above the page stack, not scattered around the viewer.
layout_hints.audit_visibility: Audit and confidentiality signals should stay present and credible without overpowering the legal or review content.

layout_hints.document_priority: The secured document itself is the primary surface. Watermarks, redactions, and audit cues should protect the content without obscuring normal reading more than necessary.
layout_hints.control_role: Navigation, zoom, and guarded download controls belong in one compact strip above the page stack, not scattered around the viewer.
layout_hints.audit_visibility: Audit and confidentiality signals should stay present and credible without overpowering the legal or review content.

transitions.redaction-reveal: opacity fade 300ms when redaction hover shows audit info

ambient.audit-badge-pulse: subtle opacity 0.7 to 1 pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite reminding user of logging
